intent: Write a compact recommendation on 'starter audiophile headphones under $150' blending storefront inventory with enthusiast opinion. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics category and collect at least 3 headphone products under $150. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/headphones AND /f/technology for posts on beginner audiophile picks, what the community considers the 'starter pair', or budget-tier mistakes. Collect at least 2 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) table the storefront picks with stats, (b) present the community's de facto shortlist and note overlap with the storefront, (c) commit to a single recommendation with reasoning. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. /f/headphones as primary forum. Starts with search URL.
